name: National History Museum
description: World-renowned museum with extensive historical collections and interactive exhibits.

name: Botanical Gardens
description: Beautiful gardens featuring exotic plants, walking trails, and a butterfly house.

name: Old Town Food Market
description: Bustling food market with local delicacies, street food stalls, and artisan produce.

name: Skyline Observation Tower
description: 360-degree panoramic views of the city from the 50th floor observation deck.

name: Riverside Adventure Park
description: Outdoor adventure park with kayaking, rock climbing, and zip-line courses.
